layout.spacing: Strict 8px scale. Generous internal padding (p-6, p-8) for containers, tight gaps (gap-4) for data clusters.
layout.radius: rounded-xl for main panels/cards, rounded-md for inputs/buttons.
layout.borders: 1px hairline borders (border-white/10 or border-[#4A4A4E]/30) everywhere to separate dark surfaces without muddy shadows.
layout.architecture: Inverted L-shape chrome: Resizable left sidebar, sticky top header, main content area.

components.sidebar: Darkest background (#131315). Navigation items use Space Mono for badges/counts. Hover state adds subtle background (surface.level1) and left border highlight.
components.command_palette: Triggered by cmd+k. Centered overlay. Glassmorphism background. Single pill input. Results have rounded keycaps for shortcuts.
components.kanban: Subtle column backgrounds (surface.level1). Cards have 1px border. Drag & drop adds a vibrant border highlight based on card status.
components.tables: Dense. Row separation via 1px border-b. Hover state shifts row to surface.level2. No vertical borders.
components.skeletons: Shimmer effect using Carbon to Graphite gradient.
components.toasts: Sonner toasts. Dark surface, border color indicates status (e.g., success/error).
components.empty_states: Centered. Uses abstract geometric textures at 10% opacity in background. Archivo heading, Space Mono instructions.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Use ONLY React + Tailwind + pure JavaScript (.js/.jsx files). DO NOT USE TypeScript (.tsx/.ts).
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (kebab-case, role-based).
Install and use `lucide-react` for all icons.
Install and use `recharts` for Analytics and Finance dashboards. Charts must have #131315 backgrounds and use the semantic colors for data lines.
Customize Shadcn components heavily to strip standard Vercel borders and replace them with Obrinex monochrome variables (1px hairline borders).
For the Command Palette (cmd+k), use `cmdk` or Shadcn Command. Style it with backdrop-blur-xl and glassmorphism settings provided.
Ensure all semantic states (success, warning, etc.) use the provided hex codes instead of Tailwind default colors.
Headers must be sticky with z-50 and backdrop blur. Do not use fully transparent headers.
All navigation elements must be visible on desktop (no hamburger menus on md+ screens).
